methods.name: igniter.io.s3_client.S3Client.download
documentation:
Downloads a file from an S3 bucket and saves it locally, tracking the progress.

```
param file_key

The key of the file to download within the bucket.

param filename

The local path where the file will be saved.
```

methods.name: igniter.io.logger_handles.FBResearchLogger.log_every
documentation:
Logs the training progress at regular intervals.

Args:
    engine: The training engine.
    optimizer: The optimizer used for training. Defaults to None.
